title: Police certificate: Who needs a police certificate - Canada.ca
content:
## Who needs a police certificate
You and any family member 18 or older may need to get a police certificate, depending on the program you’re applying to.
You must provide a police certificate if you apply for:
- International Experience Canada
If you have a prior criminal record, you may need to provide a police certificate for any other programs.
Check the program’s document checklist or local visa office requirements for details.
